strategy: Voracious Void raid boss, so coordinate as a team with a hitter, blading supports, and utility.
Attack with Ice or Death — those are only 40% resisted, while Fire and Life are fully immune (100%) and Storm, Myth, Balance, and Astral/Shadow are 70% resisted.
Lean on the inspired casts unlocked here (Brush Fire, Dismal Seraph, Fabled Revenant, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, War Oracle) since your normal schools are heavily resisted.

He self-buffs Power Current every round and can Sprite himself to set up a Gambit, so don't let the fight drag and watch for his charm/ward strips (Blizzard removes 3 of your charms, Ratatoskr's Spin removes wards).
Hold blades to the hitting round so his Blizzard doesn't strip them early, then commit one big Ice or Death hit.
cheatNotes: You get access to inspired casts here (Brush Fire, Dismal Seraph, Fabled Revenant, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, War Oracle) — lean on them since your normal schools are heavily resisted.
He stacks Power Current on himself every round, building his own damage and gambit — don't let the fight drag; his hit grows each round.
He may Sprite himself to set up a Gambit — treat the heal-over-time as a tell that a gambit payoff is coming.
